title: Column descriptors across views
excerpt:
Wouldn’t it be great if the column ‘information’ / description could also be viewed in the Interaction details view - when you open up an individual interaction view (Lead Info Widget).

posts.author: simonwark (Simon Wark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wouldn’t it be great if the column ‘information’ / description could also be viewed in the Interaction details view - when you open up an individual interaction view (Lead Info Widget).

Currently the information/description for the column only appears in the Main Table view.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Simon,

Thanks for your feature request!

I wanted to check if your request aligns with the existing feature request here → Show full description on Item Card without having to hover over it? Ideally, are you interested in having the column description appear in the item card widget? Or are you referring to other board views? Thanks!

posts.author: simonwark (Simon Wark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca
Yes I am interested in having the column descriptor appear in the item card widget.
regards
Simon

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: A post was merged into an existing topic: Show full description on Item Card without having to hover over it
